summary: iOS | Free 60 artwork missing, and update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working (Studio iOS or PTT)
scenario: Free 60 artwork missing in Poly Studio Mobile app; firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) fails on iOS and PTT
description_clean: Free 60 artwork missing in the app. Firmware update from version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working via Studio iOS or PTT.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Navigate to Device Settings for the connected Poly device
Attempt to update firmware from version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest available version
After update, check the 'Free 60' artwork or theme on the Home screen or Device Settings screen
expected: Firmware update completes successfully from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest version. The 'Free 60' artwork is displayed correctly in the app after the update.
actual: Firmware update fails or does not work via Studio iOS or PTT. The 'Free 60' artwork is missing in the app.
